Details: One study showed that the effectiveness of GAC to remove TCE is negatively impacted by the concentration of natural organic matter. More specifically, another study showed the reduction of TCE adsorption by GAC due to competition from lower molecular weight humic substances. GAC adsorption capacity for TCE was also reported to decrease with increasing temperature and presence of ethyl acetate, however, not significantly impacted by pH or salinity (specific Freundlich parameters not reported) [2136].
